# hetzner_vswitches (Data Source)

Lists all Hetzner vSwitches.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hetzner_vswitches" "all" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `vswitches` (Attributes List) List of vSwitches. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--vswitches))

<a id="nestedatt--vswitches"></a>
### Nested Schema for `vswitches`

Read-Only:

- `cancelled` (Boolean) Whether the vSwitch has been cancelled.
- `id` (Number) The unique ID of the vSwitch.
- `name` (String) The name of the vSwitch.
- `vlan` (Number) The VLAN ID.
